title: Neon Genesis Evangelion
sourceNotes: 26-episode 1995 anime paired with Yoshiyuki Sadamoto's manga (97 chapters / 14 vols, 1994-2013). Both ran concurrently from the same original concept; the manga diverges substantially in later volumes, retelling much of the End of Evangelion material in its own way. Episode-to-chapter pacing is approximate.

movies.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion
